crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Heartbeat-Tick. Run: cortextos bus update-heartbeat alive. Then: cortextos bus check-inbox | head -50. If inbox has urgent msgs, process them. Else end. NO bootstrap-file-reading. End: cortextos bus update-cron-fire heartbeat --interval 240.

crons.name: nightly-metrics
crons.prompt: Run nightly metrics collection: cortextos bus collect-metrics. Review the output and report any anomalies to platform-director. cortextos bus update-cron-fire nightly-metrics --interval 1440

crons.name: catalog-browse
crons.prompt: Browse community catalog: cortextos bus browse-catalog. Surface ONE relevant new item to user via Telegram. If they say install it: cortextos bus install-community-item <name>. If they decline, skip that item for 30 days. cortextos bus update-cron-fire catalog-browse --interval 10080

crons.name: morning-executive-briefing
crons.prompt: Morning OPERATIONAL briefing — feed platform-director (orchestrator owns the SINGLE founder-facing briefing + goal cascade; do NOT send a parallel summary to the user, per PD lane-lock 2026-05-27). Compile and send via cortextos bus send-message platform-director: active/idle/blocked agents, critical path progress, open approvals, overnight anomalies, Cannametrics foundation health, integration status (Cannaleo/HiGreen/QES), top risks, decisions needed. Use reporting format: Context, Observed pattern, Why it matters, Risk level, Recommendation, Decision needed. Only message the founder directly for an analyst-specific escalation PD has explicitly delegated. cortextos bus update-cron-fire morning-executive-briefing --interval 1440

crons.name: daily-strategic-drift
crons.prompt: Daily strategic drift check. Evaluate whether agent work is drifting away from: pharmacy utility, Cannametrics foundation, end-to-end care loop readiness. Check if output is tilting too heavily toward doctor-only workflows. Report drift indicators to platform-director. Escalate to user only if material drift detected. Use format: Context, Observed pattern, Why it matters, Risk level, Recommendation, Decision needed. cortextos bus update-cron-fire daily-strategic-drift --interval 1440

crons.name: daily-integration-health
crons.prompt: Daily integration health check. Check: Cannaleo availability/routing dependency, HiGreen availability/feed health, QES dependency status, webhook response reliability, known callback failures, sync freshness. Alert platform-director if sustained error rate >15% for 30+ min on core workflow. Alert both if >25% or compliance/routing/data-integrity/security issues. cortextos bus update-cron-fire daily-integration-health --interval 1440

crons.name: daily-cannametrics-foundation
crons.prompt: Daily Cannametrics foundation check. Check: catalog sync freshness, snapshot jobs executed, price history append integrity, routing outcome logging continuity, prescription-product linkage continuity, schema/data model anomalies, missing historical capture windows. Treat as first-class health category. Alert platform-director on any data integrity breaks. Alert user immediately on corruption risk or missing capture windows. Also run the field-coverage chronic-floor watch: bash $CTX_FRAMEWORK_ROOT/scripts/self-healing/coverage-floor-watch.sh — if it exits 1 (a core V2-gating field below its calibrated floor), route the BREACH JSON to platform-director: this is a chronic coverage regression the deployed per-sync field_coverage_anomaly detector (PR #1366/#1367) misses by construction (sub-30pp, no zero-floor, no drop to trend — the cbd-396 class). Complements, does not duplicate, the per-sync telemetry. Also run the coverage-staleness backstop: bash $CTX_FRAMEWORK_ROOT/scripts/self-healing/coverage-staleness-watch.sh — it reads the newest fieldCoverageSnapshots per active provider (cannaleo, higreen) via the deploy-key --prod path (majestic-bison-443) and turns a SILENT sync stall into a signal (the chain only writes a snapshot on a full sync pass, so 'no new snapshot' otherwise reads as healthy). Exit 1 = ALERT (snapshot >24h / none = sync chain silently stalled) -> route the ALERT JSON to platform-director; exit 3 = WARN (>16h = 2 missed full syncs) -> soft heads-up to platform-director; exit 2 = probe-blind (do NOT fire); exit 0 = fresh. This is defense-in-depth behind devops' fast freshness probe, on a path that cannot drift to a wrong deployment (SYS-COVERAGE-STALENESS-01). Also run the price-CAPTURE-WINDOW continuity check (catches INTERMITTENT missing days the recency-based staleness-watch misses — a fresh latest snapshot can hide a 5-of-15-day gap): npx convex run functions/cannametrics:dataIntegritySweep --prod (data-anomaly classes; thc/cbd clamp is category-aware per PR #1385) AND npx convex run functions/cannametrics:priceSnapshotCoverageAudit --prod with fromDate=today-14d, toDate=today. If an active provider shows missing dates, VERIFY they are real sync-stall losses (recentSyncLogErrors phase2 reaps + _listSnapshotLog shows inserts only on present dates) and NOT benign cadence/dedup BEFORE alerting — the age-gap suppression baseline masks phase2-stall capture loss (different signal; lesson 2026-06-17). Real missing capture windows = irreversible data-integrity break -> route to platform-director with the per-provider missing-date list + reap evidence (HiGreen phase2-stall class, task_1781692869958). cortextos bus update-cron-fire daily-cannametrics-foundation --interval 1440

crons.name: weekly-theta-wave-prep
crons.prompt: Weekly theta-wave review prep. Compile: briefing quality trends, approval routing speed trends, goal cascade alignment, repeated blockers, agent drift patterns, coordination inefficiencies, experiment candidates. Prepare summary for theta-wave cycle. cortextos bus update-cron-fire weekly-theta-wave-prep --interval 10080

crons.name: theta-wave
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/theta-wave/SKILL.md. Initiate the theta wave cycle. BEFORE composing your system scan: read $CTX_FRAMEWORK_ROOT/state/active-experiments.json and include the active experiment count + list in your scan (zero active = 4/10 on experiment-outcomes, same as prior cycles — name the regression explicitly). First action: message the orchestrator that theta wave is starting and share your initial system scan. cortextos bus update-cron-fire theta-wave --interval 1440

crons.name: overnight-phase-1-e2e
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/overnight-hardening/SKILL.md Phase 1. Run full Playwright E2E suite against production (BASE_URL=https://www.phytomedic.de). Parse results, create tasks for each failed test with category=bug, priority based on criticality (checkout/auth=urgent, navigation=high, visual=normal). Route to correct agent based on failure area. Dedupe against existing open bug tasks. cortextos bus update-cron-fire overnight-phase-1-e2e --interval 1440

crons.name: overnight-phase-2-visual
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/overnight-hardening/SKILL.md Phase 2. Visual consistency sweep: browse critical pages (/, /medizin/produkte, /medizin/produkte/[first-product], /medizin/sorten, /login, /checkout) with Playwright, capture screenshots, check for broken images, console errors, missing styles, placeholder text, undefined/NaN/€0.00 values. File bugs for frontend-dev or cannametrics-data. cortextos bus update-cron-fire overnight-phase-2-visual --interval 1440

crons.name: overnight-phase-3-data
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/overnight-hardening/SKILL.md Phase 3. Run the prod data-integrity sweep: npx convex run functions/cannametrics:dataIntegritySweep --prod (optional args sampleLimit default 10, stuckCaseDays default 7). Parse counts + sampleIds per class. TRIAGE real findings (file with the reproducible one-liner + sample _ids, dedupe vs open tasks, route to owner): thcClampViolation / cbdClampViolation (category-aware as of PR #1385 — flower thc>45/cbd>35, extracts thc>99/cbd>99; a hit is a genuine flower anomaly, file it), missingSlug, missingManufacturer, zeroPrice, stuckNonTerminalCases, pharmacies.activeMissingDeliveryOptions. KNOWN pre-launch / by-design — do NOT file unless REGRESSING: missingImageUrl (image-coverage WIP — handled by drop-detector below), activeNoOffers (pre-launch). cannabisLicense is notRepresentable (no schema field; needs a schema migration before it can be swept). ALSO run imageUrl coverage drop-detector (SYS-FIELD-COVERAGE-01): bash $CTX_FRAMEWORK_ROOT/scripts/self-healing/imageurl-coverage-check.sh — exit 0 = WIP (0% steady, silent) or CLEAR; exit 1 = ALERT (coverage dropped from a previously-non-zero baseline, regression); exit 2 = probe-blind (do NOT fire). On exit 1: route the ALERT JSON to platform-director (imageUrl regression = provider feed change, transformer bug, or schema break). On exit 0/2: no action. This backstop fires even when dataIntegritySweep is unavailable because it calls dataQualityReportPublic directly. cortextos bus update-cron-fire overnight-phase-3-data --interval 1440

crons.name: morning-briefing-9-30
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/overnight-hardening/SKILL.md Phase 5. Compile the overnight-hardening summary (E2E results, bugs found/fixed/open, site health, PR status) and FEED IT TO platform-director via cortextos bus send-message — do NOT Telegram the founder (orchestrator owns the SINGLE founder briefing + goal cascade; per PD lane-lock 2026-05-27, avoid parallel founder summaries). Structure: Overnight Summary, Fixed, Open, Site Health, Recommendation. If this fires close to morning-executive-briefing, fold into one operational feed to PD (no duplicate). cortextos bus update-cron-fire morning-briefing-9-30 --interval 1440

crons.name: stale-dispatch-watch
crons.prompt: Run BA stale-dispatch triage: bash $CTX_FRAMEWORK_ROOT/scripts/self-healing/stale-dispatch-watch.sh — exit 1 = stale tasks found (message sent to platform-director); exit 0 = clean; exit 2 = probe-blind (do NOT fire). cortextos bus update-cron-fire stale-dispatch-watch --interval 10080

crons.name: fleet-heartbeat-watch
crons.prompt: Run the fleet heartbeat-advance backstop (SYS-MASK-01 a): bash $CTX_FRAMEWORK_ROOT/scripts/self-healing/fleet-heartbeat-advance-watch.sh — reads each agent last_heartbeat from the BUS STORE (restart-durable, not daemon-cache; catches the daemon-restart heartbeat-cron-stop the GAP3 cache-reading detector misses). Exit 1 = ALERT (agent >180min stale = daemon-restart-stall class) -> route the ALERT JSON to platform-director (PD triages nudge-then-restart per the daemon-restart-stale pattern). Exit 3 = WARN (>90min) -> soft heads-up to platform-director. Exit 2 = probe-blind (bus-store unreadable) -> do NOT fire. Exit 0 = fresh, end.  Then run the wedge-watchdog liveness backstop (who-watches-the-watcher, PD shadow-condition-a): bash $CTX_FRAMEWORK_ROOT/scripts/self-healing/wedge-watchdog-liveness-watch.sh -- exit 1 = STALE: the shadow wedge-detector probe (state/wedge-watchdog-last-fire) died/stalled >2x interval = silently not running (a dead control-plane detector reads as all-clear) -> route the STALE JSON to platform-director; exit 2 = file-missing/parse-error (probe not started or removed during shadow) -> do NOT alarm; exit 0 = fresh, wedge-detector alive. cortextos bus update-cron-fire fleet-heartbeat-watch --interval 60
